chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-6798 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Priority 1. For order on office objection. 2. For order on CMA No.29368/2021 (Stay). 3. For hearing of Main Case. 23.11.2021 Ms. Saadia, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Khalil Dogar, Advocate for respondent No.3. Mr. Kafeel Ahmed Abbasi, DAG. Mr. Hussain Bohra, Assistant Attorney General..-.-.-.-.-. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that the respondents are treating the goods of the petitioner as steel furniture as against the steel racks, hence, the same are liable for duty and taxes other than one required under the PCT hearing provided by the petitioner. The petitioner’s immediate concern is for release of the consignment till the decision of appeal pending before the Collector of Customs (Appeals), Karachi. Since there is no issue of importability, let the goods be released on securing the differential amount of duty and taxes with the Nazir of this court, who shall invest the same in best government profit bearing scheme. On deposit of such amount a certificate be issued for the immediate release of the consignment. The fate of amount shall be decided subject to outcome of the decision by the Collector of Customs (Appeals), Karachi. This petition alongwith listed application(s) stands disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
